Terms of Service

Last updated: May 3, 2026

By using the awroadside-fire application, you agree to these terms.

1. Services

awroadside-fire provides a platform to connect users with independent roadside assistance providers. The platform acts as the central financial authority for all transactions between users and providers.

2. Payments and Payouts

All service payments are made through the awroadside-fire platform. Providers operate as independent partners and receive payouts from the platform to their designated accounts after platform fees are deducted.

3. User Responsibilities

Users must provide accurate information and ensure safety while waiting for assistance.

3. Limitation of Liability

awroadside-fire is not responsible for the actions of independent providers.
